docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GEBURA, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SARAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEBURA, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SARAH $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF GEBURA, KAREN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SARAH
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00). SERVED JAN-15-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SARAH
CORRESPONDENCE FROM TRIPLE A RE INSURED SARAH JOHNSON, RETURNED.
